residue.config.title: Residue
residue.config.enable_mod.desc: Completely enables or disables all Residue systems.
residue.config.debug.desc: Prints internal state (memory, observer, events) to the server log.
residue.config.memory_seconds.desc: How often (in seconds) memory increases by one step. Lower values make the world deteriorate faster.
residue.config.max_memory.desc: The upper limit of memory. Event stages are calculated as percentages of this value.
residue.config.dream.desc: Enables the dream sequence — after sleeping, a segment of gameplay may turn out to have been a dream.
residue.config.torch.desc: Enables distant torches that appear in the direction the player is looking and vanish when approached.
residue.config.clone.desc: Enables the self-clone — a distant copy of the player that disappears before it can be reached.
residue.config.torch.label: — Distant Torch —
residue.config.torch.min_distance.desc: Minimum distance (in blocks) at which a torch can appear.
residue.config.torch.max_distance.desc: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which a torch can appear.
residue.config.torch.despawn_seconds.des: How many seconds the torch stays in the world if the player does not approach it.
How close (in blocks) the player must get before the torch vanishes.
residue.config.torch.max_active.desc: Maximum number of torches that can exist in the world at the same time.
residue.config.torch.spawn_chance.desc: Spawn probability per tick (value / 100000). Default 5 = 0.00005 per tick, roughly once every 3 minutes.
residue.config.clone.label: — Self Clone —
residue.config.clone.min_distance.desc: Minimum distance (in blocks) at which the clone can appear.
residue.config.clone.max_distance.desc: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which the clone can appear.
residue.config.clone.cooldown.desc: Minimum time (in seconds) between two clone appearances.
